author: y4rr
content: FCOS architecture added (fcos.rs, ~700 LoC). Anchor-free point regression: cell-center decode (cx-l, cy-t, cx+r, cy+b). Shared cls/reg heads across P3-P7 with GroupNorm(32). Per-level learned scale on reg. Centerness branch gates score: final=sqrt(cls_sigmoid * centerness_sigmoid). score_thresh=0.2, NMS_IoU=0.6, top-K=100. Pinned to ferrotorch/fcos_resnet50_fpn (SHA ed34c90097ca). PASS first-try with max_abs=1.46e-4.
